response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified the virtual YouTuber as Natsuiro Matsuri due to the hashtag #夏色まつり生誕祭2025.
2. Observed the start of a performance at 01:30. The on-screen text at 01:46 explicitly stated "IDOL SONG" and the composer "大森靖子" (Seiko Oomori).
3. Performed a search using the query: `"IDOL SONG" 大森靖子 Japanese and English lyrics`.
4. Successfully located the lyrics in Japanese and translated them to English for the JSON output.
5. Structured the JSON with two scenes: one for the intro dialogue (no vocal music) and one for the song performance (with vocal music).
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by the virtual YouTuber Natsuiro Matsuri, who introduces and then performs a cover of the song "IDOL SONG" by Seiko Oomori at her birthday live event.

scenes.description: VTuber Natsuiro Matsuri gives an introductory talk before the performance.
Natsuiro Matsuri performs the song "IDOL SONG" by Seiko Oomori. Text "IDOL SONG" and "作詞・作曲: 大森靖子" appears on screen at 01:46.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえアイドルになりたい
すっごい愛をあげたい
このいのちの使い方を
君に愛されたい

はーい！
えくぼは恋の落とし穴
夢中にさせちゃうぞ
埼玉県からきました
フレッシュレモンになりたいのー

ファンの方が恋人です
真面目なアイドル
真面目にアイドル
連中むきゅ
24時間ずっと笑顔で
うさちゃんぴー
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I want to be an idol
I want to give you incredible love
I want to be loved by you
For how I use this life of mine

Hi!
My dimples are love's pitfall
I'll make you crazy about me
I came from Saitama Prefecture
I want to be a Fresh Lemon

The fans are my lovers
A serious idol
An idol seriously
A group of muku
Smiling 24 hours a day
Usachan-pii
